title: disemma caleyana
intro: Disemma caleyana, also known as the Dorrigo Pepperbush or Pepperbush, is a shrub native to the eastern coast of Australia. The plant has been traditionally used in indigenous Australian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Disemma caleyana include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve pain, and reduce fever, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. Disemma caleyana can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and extracts, making it a versatile plant with potential applications in traditional medicine.
